sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_tuples (id UInt32, values Tuple(Int32, Int32));
SELECT id, tupleMultiply(values, (2, 3)) AS multiplied_values FROM test_tuples WHERE values.1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, tupleMultiply((currentDate() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, currentDate() + INTERVAL 2 DAY), (3, 4)) AS multiplied_dates FROM test_tuples;
SELECT id, tupleMultiply(values, (toInt32('2'), 1)) AS multiplied_values FROM test_tuples WHERE values.1 IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE date_test (event_time DateTime, duration Int32);
INSERT INTO date_test VALUES (now(), 5), (now() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR, NULL), (now() + INTERVAL '3' SECOND, 10);
SELECT event_time, tupleMultiply((duration, INTERVAL 1 HOUR), (2, 1)) AS multiplied_duration FROM date_test WHERE duration IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, tupleMultiply(values, (toInt32(0), toInt32(NULL))) AS null_case FROM test_tuples GROUP BY id HAVING multiplied_values.1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sum(tupleMultiply(values, (2, INTERVAL 1 DAY))) AS total_duration FROM test_tuples GROUP BY id HAVING total_duration > 0;
CREATE TABLE join_test (t1_id UInt32, val Tuple(Int32, Int32));
SELECT a.t1_id, tupleMultiply(a.val, (2, 2)) AS multiplied_val FROM join_test AS a JOIN test_tuples AS b ON a.t1_id = b.id WHERE b.values.1 > 1;
SELECT id, tupleMultiply((values.1, values.2 + 1), (INTERVAL '1' DAY, INTERVAL '1' HOUR)) AS complex_case FROM test_tuples WHERE values.2 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY complex_case.1 DESC;
